title: Lab
subtitle: Predict course time, required power, and PR from your weight, gear, and ability.
beta.title: Beta — accuracy not guaranteed
beta.body: Estimates from a steady-state physics model. Wind, drafting, cornering, and accel/decel are not modeled, so real results may differ.
loginRequired.title: Sign-in required
loginRequired.body: The simulator uses your courses, gear, and ability data, so please sign in to use it.
course.title: Select course
course.noProfile: This course has no elevation profile, so it can't be simulated.
params.title: Parameters
params.cdaHint: Drag coeff × frontal area. 0.22–0.32 by position.
mode.title: Mode
mode.powerHint: Assumes you hold this power for the whole course.
mode.targetTimeHint: Solves the average power required to finish in this time.
mode.prReady: PDC-based — predicting PR from CP {{cp}}W / W' {{wPrime}}J.
mode.prMissing: No PDC (CP/W') data, so PR can't be predicted. It is computed automatically once enough power data accumulates.
result.title: Result
result.disclaimer: Estimate only; does not guarantee actual results.
